columns.name: dem_sap
columns.label: SAP/NHC
columns.description: SAP code associated with the patient.

columns.name: project_stat
columns.label: Patient enrolled in any project?
columns.description: Indicates whether the patient is currently enrolled in any research project, clinical study, biobank, or precision medicine initiative at VHIO or collaborating institutions.

columns.name: project_enrollment
columns.label: Project enrollment
columns.description: Multi-select checkbox field listing specific research projects.

columns.name: project_name_other
columns.label: Other project
columns.description: Free-text field to specify research project names not listed in the "Project enrollment (checkbox)" options.

columns.name: project_pro_id
columns.label: Project Information - PRO ID
columns.description: Unique alphanumeric identifier assigned to PRO project.
